text: Lesson 38
zh: 第38课

text: Water and the traveller
zh: 水与旅行者

text: What does this text describe?
zh: 这篇文章描述的是什么？

text: Contamination of water supplies is usually due to poor sanitation close to water sources,
zh: 供水受污染通常是由于水源附近卫生条件差、

text: sewage disposal into the sources themselves, leakage of sewage into distribution systems or contamination with industrial or farm waste.
zh: 污水直接排入水源、污水渗漏进入供水系统，或是工业与农业废物造成的污染。

text: Even if a piped water supply is safe at its source, it is not always safe by the time it reaches the tap.
zh: 即使管道供水在源头是安全的，也不一定能保证到达水龙头时仍然安全。

text: Intermittent tap-water supplies should be regarded as particularly suspect.
zh: 间歇性供水的自来水应被特别视为可疑水源。

text: Travellers on short trips to areas with water supplies of uncertain quality
zh: 对于短期前往供水质量不确定地区的旅行者来说，

text: should avoid drinking tap-water, or untreated water from any other source.
zh: 应避免饮用自来水，或来自其他任何来源的未经处理的水。

text: It is best to keep to hot drinks, bottled or canned drinks of well-known brand names-international standard of water treatment are usually followed at bottling plants.
zh: 最好选择热饮，或知名品牌的瓶装、罐装饮料——因为灌装厂通常遵循国际标准的水处理规范。

text: Carbonated drinks are acidic, and slightly safer.
zh: 碳酸饮料呈酸性，相对更安全一些。

text: Make sure that all bottles are opened in your presence, and that their rims are clean and dry.
zh: 要确保所有瓶装饮品都是当着你的面开启的，瓶口应保持干净干燥。

text: Boiling is always a good way of treating water.
zh: 煮沸始终是处理饮用水的好方法。

text: Some hotels supply boiled water on request and this can be used for drinking, or for brushing teeth.
zh: 有些酒店可应要求提供开水，可用于饮用或刷牙。

text: Portable boiling elements that can boil small quantities of water are useful when the right voltage of electricity is available.
zh: 在电压合适的情况下，可以少量煮水的便携式电热元件也很有用。

text: Refuse politely any cold drink from an unknown source.
zh: 对来源不明的冷饮，应礼貌地予以拒绝。

text: Ice is only as safe as the water from which it is made,
zh: 冰块的安全程度取决于制冰用水的安全程度，

text: and should not be put in drinks unless it is known to be safe.
zh: 除非确定用水安全，否则不应将冰加入饮品中。

text: Drinks can be cooled by placing them on ice rather than adding ice to them.
zh: 可以把饮料放在冰上冷却，而不是往饮料里加冰。

text: Alcohol may be a medical disinfectant, but should not be relied upon to sterilize water.
zh: 酒精可作为医用消毒剂，但不能依靠它来给水消毒。

text: Ethanol is more effective at a concentration of 50-70 percent;
zh: 乙醇在浓度为50%至70%时效果最佳；

text: below 20 per cent, its bactericidal action is negligible.
zh: 浓度低于20%时，其杀菌作用微乎其微。

text: Spirits labelled 95 proof contain only about 47 per cent alcohol.
zh: 标注为95度的烈酒实际上只含约47%的酒精。

text: Beware of methylated alcohol,
zh: 要当心变性酒精（甲基化酒精），

text: which is very poisonous and should never be added to drinking water.
zh: 它毒性很强，绝不能加入饮用水中。

text: If no other safe water supply can be obtained,
zh: 如果无法获得其他安全水源，

text: tap water that is too hot to touch can be left to cool and is generally safe to drink.
zh: 烫得无法触碰的自来水放凉后通常可以安全饮用。

text: Those planning a trip to remote areas, or intending to live in countries where drinking water is not readily available,
zh: 对于计划前往偏远地区，或打算在饮用水供应不便的国家生活的人来说，

text: should know about the various possible methods for making water safe.
zh: 应当了解各种可使水变得安全的方法。
